description_zh: 用一个事物来比另一个事物，使描写更形象
description_en: Comparing one thing to another to make descriptions more vivid

description_zh: 把事物当作人来描写，赋予它人的动作或感情
description_en: Describing things as if they were human, giving them human actions or feelings

description_zh: 故意把事物说得比实际更大、更多、更好或更差
description_en: Deliberately exaggerating something beyond its actual scale for emphasis

description_zh: 用三个或更多结构相似的句子排列在一起，增强语势
description_en: Lining up three or more similarly structured phrases to build momentum

description_zh: 把两个相反的事物放在一起，突出它们的不同
description_en: Placing two opposite things side by side to highlight their differences

description_zh: 自己提出问题，自己回答，引起读者注意
description_en: Asking a question and answering it yourself to draw the reader's attention

description_zh: 用疑问的形式表达确定的意思，加强语气
description_en: Using a question form to express certainty, strengthening the tone

description_zh: 不直接说出事物的名称，而用与它有关的事物来代替
description_en: Referring to something by a related thing instead of its actual name

description_zh: 有意重复使用某个词语或句子，加强表达效果
description_en: Deliberately repeating a word or phrase to strengthen the expression

description_zh: 用文字模仿事物发出的声音
description_en: Using words that imitate the sound of what they describe

description_zh: 把字重复使用，加强语气或使描述更生动
description_en: Repeating characters to intensify feeling or make descriptions more vivid

description_zh: 四个字组成的固定短语，含义丰富，言简意赅
description_en: A fixed four-character phrase with rich meaning, concise and expressive

description_zh: 用不常见或新颖的量词，让表达更有画面感
description_en: Using an unexpected or creative measure word to make the expression more vivid

description_zh: 把动词当形容词用，或把形容词当动词用，让语言更有力
description_en: Using a verb as an adjective or vice versa to make language more dynamic

description_zh: 用简短有力的句子，表达干脆利落
description_en: Using brief, punchy sentences for crisp, direct expression

description_zh: 长句和短句交替使用，让文章读起来有节奏感
description_en: Alternating long and short sentences to create rhythm in the writing

description_zh: 一连串列出多个同类事物，增加丰富感
description_en: Listing multiple items of the same kind in sequence to add richness

description_zh: 用视觉、听觉、嗅觉、味觉、触觉来描写，让读者身临其境
description_en: Describing through sight, sound, smell, taste, and touch to immerse the reader

description_zh: 用周围环境的描写来烘托气氛或人物心情
description_en: Using descriptions of surroundings to set the mood or reflect a character's feelings

description_zh: 抓住一个小细节仔细描写，以小见大
description_en: Zooming in on a small detail to reveal something larger

description_zh: 通过描写某个事物来表达自己的感情
description_en: Expressing feelings by describing an object or scene

description_zh: 先说一个方面，然后话锋一转，说出不同或相反的意思
description_en: Starting in one direction then turning to express something different or opposite

description_zh: 文章的结尾和开头相呼应，形成完整的结构
description_en: The ending echoes the beginning, creating a complete structure

description_zh: 先留下疑问，吸引读者继续往下读
description_en: Leaving a question unanswered to pull the reader forward

description_zh: 通过人物的对话来展现性格或推动情节
description_en: Using characters' speech to reveal personality or advance the story
